transcript: Vena needs to create app drawer data. Mohana needs to complete Databricks certificate and Anthropic. Ganesh to complete new cohort and also architect certification. Asma needs to work on quality.
meeting_summary: The meeting discussed task assignments for team members, including creating app drawer data, completing certifications, and working on quality. Multiple team members have specific tasks to complete. These tasks are related to data, certifications, and quality improvement.

meeting_summary: The meeting discussed the calculation of Annual Contract Value (ACB) and Total Gross Annual Contract Value (ACV) for subscription-based services, using Netflix as an example. The calculation involves determining the monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and adding platform fees and processing fees. The team also discussed how to calculate the total ACB up for renewal and the total gross ACV.

action_items.task: Review technical documentation for calculating Annual Contract Value (ACB) and Total Gross Annual Contract Value (ACV)
action_items.context: I am going to share with you guys by morning ok and this is what any question now as of no no say the technical

meeting_summary: The meeting discussed the calculation of Annual Contract Value (ACV) and Total Gross ACV, including the formulas and parameters used to determine these values. The speaker explained the difference between Total ACV up for renewal and forecasted Total ACV, and how to calculate the expansion and churn amounts.

action_items.task: Review the technical documentation for calculating ACV and Total Gross ACV
Go through the technical documentation and ask questions if needed
